Linux fused ASR/VAD/diarization/Kokoro workbench real-service matrix		skiplinuxreal-acoustic-workbenchtranscriptionState=off chimeIn=should-respond wakewordContext=idle-wake noiseRejection=noisy-reverberant voices=multi-speakerrequires Linux runner; current=darwinbun run --cwd plugins/plugin-local-inference voice:workbench --real$VOICE_REAL_MATRIX_OUT/voice-workbench-real .github/issue-evidence/9147-real-audio-matrix-m4max.md

Real openWakeWord head wake-context cells		skiplinuxwakeword-device-gaptranscriptionState=on chimeIn=should-not-respond wakewordContext=mid-transcription-wake noiseRejection=overlapping-speech voices=multi-speakerELIZA_OPENWAKEWORD_REAL_READY is not set for a real wake-word head runbun run --cwd plugins/plugin-local-inference voice:workbench --real$VOICE_REAL_MATRIX_OUT/voice-workbench-real
